Platform Capabilities

Everything You Need to Ship at Scale

Aries combines AI reasoning, workflow orchestration, and multi-platform delivery into a single integrated system.

🧠

Multi-Model Reasoning

Chain multiple LLMs — Gemini, GPT, Claude — into sophisticated reasoning pipelines. Each model handles what it does best, orchestrated into a single coherent output.

📊

AI-Driven Research

Automated competitor intelligence, market research, and trend analysis. Synthesized reports delivered on schedule via n8n workflows.

✍️

Content Strategy Engine

Generate data-driven content strategies aligned with your brand voice, audience segments, and performance history.

🎬

Production Pipeline

Full content production from brief to publish-ready assets. Copy, imagery, video — all generated and refined through approval gates.

📡

Multi-Platform Publishing

Unified dispatch to 7 platforms: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, X, YouTube, Reddit, and TikTok. Format-aware adaptation per channel.

🔄

n8n Orchestration

Production-grade workflow engine with automatic error repair, retry scheduling, idempotent processing, and approval resumption.

🛡️

Enterprise Security

Multi-tenant RBAC, encrypted credential storage, session hardening with CSRF/XSS protection, and audit-ready access controls.

🔌

OAuth Broker

Centralized OAuth2 connection management across all platforms. Automatic token refresh, health monitoring, and reconnection flows.

📅

Calendar & Scheduling

Visual scheduling with publish windows, sync controls, and cross-platform coordination. Never miss a distribution window.

🔧

Self-Healing Workflows

Bounded repair loops detect, diagnose, and fix failures automatically. Escalation paths and failure-class tracking built in.

📈

Operations Dashboard

Real-time visibility into queue health, publish velocity, token expiry, and platform connection status across all tenants.

🧪

Sandbox Environment

Full-fidelity sandbox provisioning for testing workflows end-to-end before production deployment. Isolated tenant simulation.

Ready to See It in Action?

Get hands-on with Aries and experience the full pipeline.

Get in Touch
